headline: Can TTD Capitalize on Agoda's High-Intent Travel Audience Across APAC?
summary: The Trade Desk teams up with Agoda to unlock APAC travel data, helping advertisers reach high-intent travelers across premium digital channels.

raw.headline: Can TTD Capitalize on Agoda's High-Intent Travel Audience Across APAC?

headline: Agoda Spotlights Six Scenic Road Trip Destinations in Asia
summary: Digital travel platform Agoda's latest recommendations highlight destinations where travelers can embark on scenic getaways where the journey itself becomes an integral part of the adventure. With a curated list of unique road trip destinations across Asia, Agoda's guide offers travelers the flexibility to explore by car, cycling, or motorbike, turning every mile into a memorable experience.
